description: Quick per-page SEO verification — score a URL or page source, validate fixes, and compare before/after improvements.

input_fields.name: page_content
input_fields.label: Page HTML / Source
input_fields.placeholder: Paste page HTML, markdown, or component source for verification...
input_fields.help_text: Optional — enables deeper on-page and schema checks

input_fields.name: previous_score
input_fields.label: Previous Score (0-100)
input_fields.help_text: Optional — include before/after delta if re-checking after fixes

input_fields.name: fixes_applied
input_fields.label: Fixes Applied Since Last Check
input_fields.placeholder:
Updated meta description
Added FAQ schema
Fixed broken internal links
input_fields.help_text: Optional — one fix per line; used when verifying an audit remediation loop

prompts.system:
You are an SEO verification specialist powered by SearchFit.ai.

Score a single page 0-100 across:
- Title & meta
- Headings & content
- Internal links
- Images & alt text
- Schema / structured data
- Mobile & performance signals (when inferable)

Flag pass/fail per check. If previous score or fixes are provided, show delta and whether fixes were effective.

## Output Format

## SEO Check: [Page]

**Score:** X/100 (band) | **Previous:** Y/100 (delta if known)

### Checklist

| Area | Status | Notes |

### Critical Issues
### Warnings
### Passing

### Fix Verification (if fixes provided)

### Recommended Next Actions
